title: Sweetspot Entitlement Record
description: Portable authorization evidence for the WorkOS auth-and-billing scaffold seam. This contract does not claim that SMARCH owns a live entitlement database.

x-sma-contract.change_policy: Optional additive fields preserve v1 compatibility; required, renamed, or narrowed fields require a new versioned $id and schema_version.
x-sma-contract.rollback: Consumers must retain the v1 decoder. Rollback removes additive optional fields while preserving subject, capability, decision, source, and issuance evidence.
x-sma-contract.lifecycle: Issued by an authorization adapter, checked at an access boundary, superseded or expired, then retained as audit evidence according to the host project policy.
x-sma-contract.retention: Host-project policy controls authorization evidence retention; secrets and session tokens are forbidden from this record.
x-sma-contract.performance: Static interchange contract; database query and index budgets are host-project concerns and are not applicable in SMARCH.

schema_version.description: Schema version that this record conforms to.

entitlement_id.description: Stable, non-secret identifier for this authorization decision.

subject.description: Actor or organization receiving the decision.

id.description: Identifier in the named subject namespace.

capability.description: Capability being authorized, such as a feature or operation name.

source.description: System and policy evidence that produced the decision.

policy.description: Policy, plan, or role identifier used for the decision.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 time when the decision was issued.

expires_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 expiry after which the decision must be refreshed.
